examples: He set it down carefully on the baize cloth.
The master of the house scarcely set foot beyond the green baize door; the mistress only to supervise.
The room, which was fairly big, was furnished with large chairs and a round table with a green baize cover.
"Hurricane" Higgins is widely regarded as one of the most exciting players to have ever graced the green baize.
Born just a stones throw from the famous Gwent mines, Williams was a promising amateur boxer before opting for a career on the green baize.
